name: §dSpider
description:
§8Combat Pet

§7Strength: §c50
§7Crit Chance: §910%

§6One With The Spider
§7Applies §c+15❁ Strength §7to all
§4Arachnal Ж §7weapons, armor, and
§7equipment you have equipped.

§6Web-weaver
§7Upon hitting a monster, it becomes
§7slowed by §a40%§7.

§6Spider Whisperer
§7Spider, Cave Spider and Tarantula
§7minions work §a30% §7faster while on
§7your island.

§6Web Battlefield
§7Killing mobs grants §c+0.06❁ Strength
§7and §b+0.01✯ Magic Find §7for §a40s §7to all
§7players staying within §a20 §7blocks of
§7where they died. §8Stacks up to 10
§8times.

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

§d§lMYTHIC

variants.name: Black Widow Spider Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to
§aSpider§7 pets.

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!
